title: Asukas Cursing
wikitext:
[]: Asuka's Cursing             Quote Post by houtaru » Fri Oct 15, 2004 1:12 am In the commentary in Volume 2, Tiffany Grant remarked that Amanda Winn Lee, the producer of the english versions of the Eva movies, allowed her to use R-rated curse words. Asuka curses during the fight with the Eva series in EOE. Does anyone know what those curses mean? Just curious.

[]:             Quote Post by Esion » Fri Oct 15, 2004 1:20 am I am fairly certain that she says "shit" in german a number of times.

[]:             Quote Post by MAGI » Fri Oct 15, 2004 1:22 am I picked up one: "Take this, arschloch!" as in "a-hole" whilst she fought the UN forces. It's also in Death&Rebirth. If I remeber right, curse words about bodily functions are more offensive than ones related to sex. I forgot the rest. :? And yes, she did say scheiss a couple of times.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Oct 15, 2004 2:19 am MAGI wrote: And yes, she did say scheiss a couple of times.

[]:             Quote Post by MAGI » Fri Oct 15, 2004 3:58 am Or "ScheiÃŸe" if you want it any more accurate. 8)

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Fri Oct 15, 2004 10:11 am why would those be r-rated? and she also used schiesse before...but she was using them a lot during her fight with the mp evas...was there anything else besides schiesse and arschloch

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Oct 15, 2004 11:16 am sadsadshinji wrote: why would those be r-rated? and she also used schiesse before...but she was using them a lot during her fight with the mp evas...was there anything else besides schiesse and arschloch

[]:             Quote Post by houtaru » Fri Oct 15, 2004 1:51 pm Didn't she say something like 'esta' in EOE when she crunched one of those Eva series like a crab leg.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Fri Oct 15, 2004 2:28 pm houtaru wrote: Didn't she say something like 'esta' in EOE when she crunched one of those Eva series like a crab leg.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Fri Oct 15, 2004 3:00 pm Dark FireStar wrote: When i first saw EoE I started curseing in German. lol.

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Fri Oct 15, 2004 3:02 pm She said the german word for one, that being the first MP Eva she killed. I think the word is erste, but I'm not sure.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Fri Oct 15, 2004 3:07 pm coff wrote: She said the german word for one, that being the first MP Eva she killed. I think the word is erste, but I'm not sure.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Fri Oct 15, 2004 3:42 pm the_seventh_child wrote: coff wrote: She said the german word for one, that being the first MP Eva she killed. I think the word is erste, but I'm not sure.

[]:             Quote Post by Esion » Fri Oct 15, 2004 3:44 pm I do believe that during the fight she counts down the numbers of the "dead" MP evas cause she was making a game of it. She had a limited number of time and she was certain she could kill them fast enough. She also randomly swore. Something I think we would all do in her case. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Fri Oct 15, 2004 3:48 pm Yeah probilty I think she broke a record of "Most Bad Guys Destroyed Under 3 min" or somthin.lol.

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Fri Oct 15, 2004 9:30 pm Dark FireStar wrote: wow congratulations(sarcastic) lol J/k What does "Erste" mean??

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Fri Oct 15, 2004 9:35 pm here are the only german words i know ( all are in the series at some point) du hure- you bitch schiest-shit gott in himmel- god in heaven Mien gott- my god dunkepoff- simpleton(idiot) gott-god those are all the ones that i can think of and please correct me if i am wrong

[]:             Quote Post by Cogboy » Fri Oct 15, 2004 10:10 pm 'ein' is one. 'erste' i think is first. 'dumkopf' is literally dumbhead. ( i think this is what you meant by dunkepoff?)

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Sat Oct 16, 2004 12:04 pm yes. my spelling isn't the best when it comes to languages i don't speak fluently

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sat Oct 16, 2004 3:26 pm ein? as in ich ein bein Asuka?

Asuka curses during the fight with the Eva series in EOE. Does anyone know what those curses mean? Just curious.
